founder.name: Sebastian Diaz
founder.description1: Founder of Genix. Specialized in transforming complex business visions into <1>scalable, high-impact digital realities</1>.
founder.description2: With a proven track record architecting platforms like <1>Reactable AI</1> and <1>Junngla SpA</1>, Sebastian bridges the gap between <3>enterprise-grade engineering</3>—spanning Node.js, Nest.js, and Cloud Infrastructure—and premium product design.
founder.description3: A Certified Scrum Professional dedicated to <1>agile precision</1> and <3>evolutionary code quality</3>. We don't just build software; we engineer adaptive systems designed to scale with your business and captivate your users.
